## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.7

### 🧭 HACS and Validation
- Moves the minimum Home Assistant version requirement to `hacs.json`, where HACS expects it for custom repository validation.
- Removes the unsupported `homeassistant` key from the Home Assistant integration manifest so hassfest validation passes.
- Keeps the release format aligned as GitHub tag `v1.3.7` and manifest version `1.3.7`.

### 📷 Camera Motion
- Includes the camera motion mapping fixes from v1.3.6 for APK-style motion event payloads, nested event items, and top-level camera event payloads.
